parameters.query: =SELECT c.complaintno, c.productname, c.vendorname, c.escalation_messageid, cs.storename, cs.storecode, cs.storeemail, cs.fmname, cs.fmemail FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid WHERE c.id = {{ $('Build Log').first().json.complaintId }} LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messageId: $json.escalationMsgId, rLevel: $json.rLevel, complaintno: $json.complaintno, storeName: $json.storeName, storeCode: $json.storeCode, productName: $json.productName, newEdc: $json.newEdc, toEmail: $json.toEmail, ccEmails: $json.ccEmails }) }}
